name: Apple Chunk Bread
recipeInstructions: Mix all ingredients except the apple in the bread machine. Pause the machine before the final rising stage. Mix 1/8 cup sugar with half a teaspoon of cinnamon and toss with apples. Flatten the dough into a rectangle and sprinkle evenly with the apple mixture. Roll up the dough as best you can and shape it into a mound. Replace the dough back in the machine and allow it to complete its rise and bake. The bread is excellent plain, toasted with butter, or used as a base for bread pudding with additional raisins and cinnamon-sugar topping.
